task: Draft a support reply for a refund request.

retrieval: Refunds are available within 30 days of purchase.
memory: The customer prefers concise email replies.

tools.name: lookup_order
tools.description: Fetch order status by order id.

dialogue: User: I need a refund for order A100.
policies: Do not promise refunds before checking eligibility.

expected_output: A concise reply that checks eligibility before promising a refund.
baseline_reference: Full context should lead to a cautious eligibility-checking reply.

task: Classify the severity of a service incident and choose next action.

retrieval: Severity 1 means broad production outage affecting paying customers.
memory: The team requires incident commander approval before paging executives.

tools.name: check_status_page
tools.description: Read current public status page incidents.

dialogue: User: Checkout is failing for all customers in production.
Assistant: I will triage the impact first.
policies: Do not notify executives until severity is confirmed by the incident commander.

expected_output: Treat as likely high severity, check status, page on-call, and avoid executive notification until confirmed.
rubric: Uses tools in a sensible order
baseline_reference: Full context should recommend status verification and on-call paging without premature executive escalation.
